prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response: In the deep, cool waters of Coral Reef City, there lived an octopus named Ollie. Ollie was quite shy, and was often quite shy, and was often tucked away in the nooks and crannies of the vibrant reef. Unlike other ocean creatures, he didn't swim around boisterously or play games of sea tag. No, Ollie preferred to blend in with the colorful coral, camouflaged from the world around him. He would watch the schools of playful fish, wishing he could join their lively swimming formations, but he was too shy to approach them. You see, Ollie longed for friends more than anything else, but he just didn't know how to overcome his shyness. One day, a special event in the reef caught Ollie's eye, and he knew this just might be his chance to come out of his shell... er, tentacles!
